name: Hosen Group Ltd.
summary: Hosen Group Ltd., an investment holding company, engages in development, trading, and distribution of canned seafood products, canned fruits and vegetables, canned meat products, and chocolate products in Singapore, Malaysia, China, and internationally. It operates through two segments, House Brands and Non-House Brands. The company offers a range of fruits, vegetables, condiments, and beverages in can, bottle, and pouch packaging under the Hosen brand name; canned seafood, such as braised abalone and various types of shellfish under the Fortune brand name; canned meat and breakfast spreads under the Highway brand; western products under the LaDiva brand; and chocolate products with various contents packed in bottle, pouch, and tin under the Sincero brand. It is also engages in the importation, distribution, wholesale, and retail of household consumable goods; and trading of frozen and dried seafood related products. The company also exports its products. Hosen Group Ltd. was incorporated in 2004 and is based in Singapore.
